name: ZOSU Ocean VR
short_description: Explore the Ocean in Virtual Reality! This is a relaxing game / experience where you are ZOSU the explorer collecting sea creatures to save them from extinction in a series of beautiful levels with over 100 types of creatures to see and save.
detailed_description:
Overview:
- Explore the ocean in Virtual Reality! Many beautiful and exotic sea creatures await.
- This is an easy to play, relaxing, game / experience where you are ZOSU the explorer and you are collecting sea creatures to save them from extinction to score points in a series of beautiful levels with a large variety of creatures.
- 30 ocean levels to explore, more of a relaxing experience than a game.
- Over 100 sea animals to save, the majority are randomly spawned.


Controls:
- Built-in right hand jetpack for movement. Jetpack body movement is set to the direction of your right hand.
- Walking and jumping movement is set to the direction you are looking.
- Score points by collecting fish and finding randomly spawned treasure.

Gameplay:
- Timed scoring and freeplay modes.
- Sea creatures include starfish, turtles, dolphins, sharks, whales, squid, dinosaurs, many common and exotic fish, and large sea mammals.
